title: digitaria striata
intro: Digitaria striata, also known as Striped Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Digitaria striata are said to include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Digitaria striata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
